title: acalypha parvula
intro: Acalypha parvula, also known as the small copperleaf or small acalypha, is a flowering plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
